notes: Primarily a legal argument/position piece proposing 'embedded compliance automation.' It includes a brief self-authored 'Case Study Analysis' of a Legal Citation Analyzer app the author built and ran compliance prompts against, but this is an illustrative anecdotal walkthrough (no systematic data, metrics, or evaluation protocol), not a rigorous empirical study; cited empirical figures (e.g., Perry et al.) are secondary literature, not the author's own data.
